raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Annis Deenaß/ kad tee Sohgi
waldtja / bija
Badda-Laikſtai
Semmê. Tapehz
nogahje weens Wihrs no Betle-
mes Juhda par Swechineeku miſt
Moaba Klaijumôs/ar fawn See-
wu/ un jaweem diwi Dehleem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Wihra Wahrdß bija
Elineleß/ un winna Seewas
Wahrdß Naëmja / un winna di-
weju Dehlu Wahrdß Mahlons
un Kilions/ Eewrätteri no Betle-
mes Juhda/ un tee nahze us Mo-
aba Klaijumeem/ un palikke tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Elineleß Naëmjas
Wihrs nomirre/ un winna ar ja-
weem diwi Dehleem atlikke pabri/
tee rehine few Moabitern See-
wß/ tahß pirinas Wahrdß btja
Arpa / un tahß ohtras Wahrdß
Rutte.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee palikke tur pee de-
mits Gaddeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nomirre arridsan ſchee
buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahß winna ar fa-
wahn Weddeklem/un atgreeseahß
no tahß Moabiteru Seines/ jo ta
bij Moaba Semmê dsrdejti / ka
tas KUNGS effohts peemeklejs
fawus Laudis/ winneem Mais
dohdains.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz aigahje winna no
tahß Weetas/ fur ta bij bijuft /
un winnas diwi Weddekles ar
winnu. Un ka winna pa Zettu
gahje atgreestees us to Semini
Juhda/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gazzija Naëmja us fa-
wahn diwi Weddeklem: Eita/
atgreeseetees ikweena us fawas
Mahtß Nammu/lai tas KUNGS
Scheblastibu pee jums darra/ it-
tin ka juhs effat darrijschi pee teem
Nomirruscheem/ un pee mannis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lat tas KUNGS jums
dohd / ka juhs Duffefchannu at-
rohdat / ikweena fawa Wihra
Namma / un winna skuhpstija
tahß / tad pazehle tahß fawu
Balktmi / un raudaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahß tazztja us win-
nas: Mehß gribbam ar tewim
eet pee taweem Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Naëmja tazzija : At-
greeseetees/ mannas Meitas/ ka-
pehz buhtut juhs ar man gahju-
ſchas? Woi tad man wehl Dehtt
warretu mannäs Meetas buht /
kas jums warretu par Wihrceem
buht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
